title: AL's Zombies Revamped
description: A pack that revamps Zombies and adds more variants!
body:
![Zombies Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6311b36cdb3f8abc424812418ec1cf6a1483067.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Zombies and adds more variants based on the new default skins!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8WVZPN3CB70" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 

This pack adds things like Frozen Zombies, Desert Zombies, Crawler Zombies, and more! 

 

 

Nametag only Zombie Skins/Variants:

- Jesse

- Bouldering Zombie

- Lobber Zombie

- Valorie

- Hex

- Adriene

- Hal



- Kureiji Ollie

- Bride Ollie

- Sugarbaby Ollie

- Ninja Ollie

- Olivia 

 

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality

 

There's also a version compatible with Fresh Animations!
